utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh Mon , listen I have to ask !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , Joey Tribbiani invited me back to his apartment , now does he do this with a lot of girls ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah , a lot . A lot , a lot !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ohh ! And I am one of them ! ! Wow ! Oh , I just cannot believe this ! I mean , Joey Tribbiani !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , you know it is none of my business , but are not you married ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah . Oh I just wish we could not be married for a little bit ! You know I just wish we could be like on a break !
